{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Mon Teris
| aliases = Teris, Mon Teris
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Copper madra}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Enforcer]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Mon family]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Wei Mon Teris Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Wei Mon Teris is a member of the [[Wei clan]] and belongs to the [[Mon family]]. A year younger than [[Lindon]], he is a [[Copper]]-stage [[sacred artist]] who serves as an [[Enforcer]], a role that allows him to use his [[madra]] to enhance his physical speed, toughness, and strength. During an encounter with a tree-[[Remnant]], Teris fled the situation, leaving [[Lindon]] to face the danger alone. Although he initially attempted to frame [[Lindon]] by providing a dishonest account of the event to the [[First Elder]], his cowardice was ultimately exposed. As punishment for abandoning a [[Foundation]]-stage member, he received three lashes from the [[First Elder]] in front of his clan. Despite this disgrace, Teris has later been seen interacting with [[Lindon]] and attempting to confront [[Yerin]] with a knife before being subdued.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Mon Teris is a member of the [[Mon family]] and the cousin of [[Lindon]]. As a [[Copper]]-stage [[sacred artist]] and [[Enforcer]], he utilizes [[Copper]] [[madra]] to enhance his speed, toughness, and strength. He is known to wear snowfox skin. Following a period of discipline, Teris was punished by the [[First Elder]] with three whippings, isolated meditation, and a withheld stipend.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Teris is a [[Copper stage]] [[Enforcer]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Teris is a [[Copper]]-stage [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Teris uses [[Copper]] [[madra]] to bolster his strength, toughness, and speed.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Teris's full name is [[Wei Mon Teris]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Teris]] wears snowfox skin.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Teris is [[Lindon]]'s cousin.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Teris was punished by the [[First Elder]] with a withheld stipend, isolated meditation, and three whippings.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Teris]] is a member of the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Teris betrayed [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Teris is a year younger than [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Mon family]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
